focus_points.label: Where they want to stretch their facilitation skills
focus_points.reason: As a Lead Scrum Master in a Growth & career plan meeting, identifying specific areas for skill development is crucial for career progression.

focus_points.label: Expectations and success criteria for passing probation
focus_points.reason: Given that they have not passed probation yet, clarifying role expectations and success criteria is essential to ensure alignment and support their growth.

focus_points.label: Feedback they've received from the team
focus_points.reason: Understanding feedback from the team can provide insights into their performance and areas for improvement, especially while still in probation.
